---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Lunaria
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like, including any API or UI changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the workflow or scenario where this feature would be used.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, references, or links to related issues.
